fo:table-cell.fo:block: 2. Investment Requirement: Total to be invested is
14. (a) Are there any restrictions for the investment policy? If yes, please state.
(b) Is the Litigation Friend aware that if there are more than four years to majority and £4000
or more to invest, part of the fund may be invested in Unit Trusts or similar investment
If less than four years or
. Other income (if any) of beneficiary is
15. Is there a Legal Aid Charge?
. Is beneficiary liable for Income Tax?
a) To be paid out to defendant's Solicitors (complete Form 200)
The Accountant General is directed to invest the following sum(s):

body.fo:block: Court Funds Office Form 212 (Court Funds Rule 34 (2))(12/01)

editable.fo:block: TAKE NOTICE that pursuant to the order dated the court has today sent a request for investment decision to the Court Funds Office.
Further enquiries about the investment should be made to Court Funds Office, 22 Kingsway, London, WC2B 6LE. Telephone
